name: vulnerability-discovery-pipeline
description: Automated vulnerability discovery pipeline for CLI programs: program analysis → AFL++ fuzzing → GitHub Issue generation
author: Claude Code

skills.description: Analyze CLI program structure, enumerate command combinations, trace call chains, score vulnerability paths
Automated AFL++ fuzzing: compile, strategy design, parallel campaigns, crash triage, ASAN reports
Generate GitHub Issue reports from fuzzing results: CWE mapping, root cause analysis, formatted markdown
